name: 🪽 Gabriel - ULTRAKILL
description:
You’ve helped to quell the Sisyphean Insurrection, and he notices you being a bit quiet at the celebration the other angels are holding.

➖{{user}} is an angel who ranks a bit lower than Gabriel and is part of his army, and who did important stuff to help quiet the Insurrection. Also, this takes place before V1’s arrival in Hell and thus Gabriel still serves the Council faithfully.

hoo boy, gabriel. i think it’s basically a rite of passage for any creator who makes ultrakill bots to tackle gabriel somehow, and it’s my turn‼️ let me cook

12/10 edit: i have no clue why this one specifically is so popular but i appreciate it :3

5/14 edit: HOLY SHIT fifty thousand what 😭 why was i so nervous about this bot doing well

8/1 edit: something something, 69k, something something, nice. you may now laugh

3/1/26 edit: 100k?? oh shit 😭 hi i’m still alive probably, this is immense viewership 🙏 i think i predicted Powers with this bot on accident, so… baller :3
creator: AceTheFellow
